name: The Little War
short_description: "The Little War" is a fast paced PvP shooter. The game has a variety of weapons and MOBA, Capture The Flag, DeathMatch and other game modes, more unique lift platform system. Easy pick up and play, no complicated setups or rules: it’s kill or be killed!
detailed_description:
"The Little War" is a fast paced PvP shooter. The game has a variety of weapons and MOBA, Capture The Flag, DeathMatch and other game modes, more unique lift platform system. Easy pick up and play, no complicated setups or rules: it’s kill or be killed!

Maps and Modes

  • Hexagons covers a wide variety of locations in its many maps. Some are large and some are small, but all of them have personality and something that makes it unique and different Gameplay:
  • MOBA Mode (Unskilled pure shooting MOBA mode)
  • DeathMatch
  • Capture The Flag

Game Features

  • Unique lift platform system that allows you to have more time to kill at altitude.
  • A variety of weapons in the game, there are left and right two shooting modes. There are always new ways to kill enemies in Hexagons.
  • The game has multiple game characters.
  • More features are under development.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*
